reach_why: It sharpens familiar skepticism about AI creativity, but does not open clearly new explanatory territory.
novelty_why: It non-obviously links prompt leakage, search-pool curation, and stake-driven rhetoric into one critique.
falsifiable_why: Vary prompt information and candidate pools; if outputs still exceed inputs, the critique weakens.
explanation: Apparent machine creativity may reflect hidden upstream structure, especially when high stakes distort evaluation.
